arts.ttl: WATCH: Robert Lewandowski comes back to haunt Bayern Munich as Barcelona re-take lead
arts.sum: Barcelona are aiming for back-to-back victories in the Champions League. They got off to an excellent start against Bayern Munich before being pegged back, although they have now re-taken the lead before half time at the Estadi Olimpic. It was Raphinha that opened the scoring inside 60 seconds, although Harry Kane netted the equaliser for […] The post WATCH: Robert Lewandowski comes back to haunt Bayern Munich as Barcelona re-take lead appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Barcelona’s Lamine Yamal sets another Champions League record
arts.sum: Barcelona starlet Lamine Yamal has on Wednesday etched his name ever further into the history books of European football. This comes owing to his appearance in Barcelona’s meeting with Bayern…

arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Barca-Bayern, Liverpool-Leipzig
arts.sum: The latest updates and analysis from Matchday 3 of the 2024-25 Champions League season, with Barcelona facing Bayern Munich and RB Leipzig hosting Liverpool.

arts.ttl: On-loan Barcelona star Vitor Roque secures La Liga award nomination
arts.sum: The nominees for the La Liga U23 Player of the Month have on Wednesday been announced. And featuring front and centre, in what will no doubt be a morale-boosting development…

arts.ttl: Report: FC Barcelona keeping keen eye on Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies during Champions League match
arts.sum: According to a report from Mundo Deportivo, FC Barcelona is going to be watching Bayern Munich star Alphonso Davies very closely when the teams square off tonight in the Champions League : The Catalan club has always liked the Canadian left-back and even more so now that Hansi Flick is the owner of the Barça bench.

arts.ttl: Photo: La Masia talents reunited before Barcelona vs Bayern Munich
arts.sum: A photo from the buildup to Barcelona’s meeting with Bayern Munich on Wednesday has gone viral across social media. This comes after La Masia talents past and present were reunited…

arts.ttl: Alphonso Davies: Man Utd and Real Madrid told ASTRONOMICAL demands
arts.sum: Alphonso Davies: Man Utd and Real Madrid told ASTRONOMICAL demands Alphonso Davies is demanding a €15 million signing bonus in addition to his sizeable salary, according to German media.

arts.ttl: Confirmed lineups: Barcelona vs. Bayern Munich
arts.sum: The lineups for Wednesday's Champions League clash between FC Barcelona and FC Bayern Munich have been announced.

arts.ttl: Watch: Barcelona’s ‘9 of the future’ nets twice in Youth League win over Bayern Munich
arts.sum: Barcelona starlet Òscar Gistau proved himself the star of the show, en route to the club’s UEFA Youth League downing of Bayern Munich on Wednesday. Barca’s U19s marked their return…
